overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor town during golden hour. The character exits a covered brick archway, walks along a cobblestone dock past moored ships and wooden cranes, enters a torchlit warehouse interior, and exits into a sunlit courtyard with wooden fortifications.

events.description: exits covered brick archway into open harbor area

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the brick archway toward the harbor exit

entered.detail: large curved brick ceiling with warm torch lighting creating orange glow
dark wooden furniture and storage against the stone wall
distant view of water, ships, and sunset sky visible through the arch exit

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a covered brick archway with warm torch lighting. The character walks forward through the stone corridor, approaching the exit where golden hour sunlight and a harbor view become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval harbor dock with ships and loading cranes

events.description: passes group of NPCs sitting on the dock railing
approaches large wooden crane structure along the waterfront

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone dock, passing seated NPCs and approaching wooden cranes and barrels

notable_agents.action: three shirtless men sitting on wooden dock railing, conversing casually

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence along the water edge with vertical posts
tall medieval sailing vessels with furled sails moored in the harbor
large wooden lifting crane with rope pulley system for loading cargo
whitewashed stone building with red tile roof and arched windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway into the open harbor, the character walks along a cobblestone dock lined with wooden railings. Three NPCs sit conversing on the left railing while tall ships are moored in the water. The character passes a large wooden cargo crane and approaches a stone warehouse building on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront terrace with stairs leading to building entrance

events.description: ascends stone stairs to upper terrace level alongside warehouse
approaches wooden door of stone building for entry

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs along the warehouse building, approaching a wooden entrance door

entered.detail: stone steps leading up to the building terrace level
arched wooden doorway with metal studs and heavy timber construction
detailed stone wall with arched windows and wooden loading platforms

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the waterfront, the character ascends a stone staircase to an upper terrace. The stone warehouse facade dominates the right side with its arched windows and red roof. The character approaches a heavy wooden entrance door at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark medieval warehouse interior with wooden scaffolding

events.description: enters dark interior from bright sunset, dramatic shift to torchlight illumination
approaches exit doorway with daylight visible at the far end

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit warehouse interior, passing wooden scaffolding and storage areas toward the exit

entered.detail: rough wooden support beams and elevated platforms for storage
rows of wooden storage barrels stacked against the walls
wall-mounted torches providing warm orange flickering light
stone archway leading deeper into the building interior

segments.scene_description: Entering the building, the lighting shifts dramatically from golden hour sunlight to dark torchlit interior. The character walks through a warehouse filled with wooden scaffolding, stacked barrels, and rough timber supports. Wall sconces cast warm orange light as the character moves toward a distant exit doorway.

events.description: exits dark building into bright daylight courtyard with sudden exposure change

agents.ego_description: exiting the warehouse into a sunlit courtyard with wooden fortifications and a distant stone tower

entered.detail: wooden defensive walls and fortification structures
tall medieval stone watchtower with crenellated top
wooden supply cart with canvas cover and cargo
simple wooden bench seating near the exit

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark warehouse, the character emerges into a bright sunlit courtyard with wooden fortifications and defensive palisades. A tall stone watchtower rises in the distance, and wooden supply carts are scattered around the yard. The character descends a wooden ramp into the open courtyard area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered brick corridor through a bustling harbor and into a fortified courtyard. It begins under a covered brick archway lit by warm torches, moving forward until the stone corridor opens into the brilliant golden hour sunlight of a cobblestone dock. As the character passes moored ships and a large wooden cargo crane, the camera ascends a stone staircase toward a warehouse facade before crossing the threshold into a dark, torchlit interior filled with scaffolding and barrels. The scene then shifts from the dim warehouse shadows back into bright daylight as the character exits through a distant doorway. Finally, the camera moves through a sunlit courtyard featuring wooden fortifications and a tall stone watchtower, descending a wooden ramp into the open yard.
